narrative:
Springboro City 1-A (precinct in Warren County) has 1,083 registered voters, with 49.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points.
